reason: Test verifies agent can use GitHub tool to check authenticated user and return GitHub username
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded with sidebar showing agents
Clicked agent "QA-20260424-214058-pe7v" in sidebar — Agent opened and displayed, status showing "idle"
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status confirmed as "idle"
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message appeared in input field, send button enabled
Clicked send button — Message sent, agent transitioned to "working" state
Waited for account access request — Account Access Request card appeared after 3 seconds
Granted GitHub account access — Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub access
Waited for API request review — API Request Review card appeared asking to allow GET /user request
Approved API request — Clicked "Allow Once" to allow the API request
Waited for response — Agent completed processing in 17 seconds
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Took final screenshot — Screenshot saved showing complete chat with GitHub username response
